requirement_topic.en: EMC and Power Quality — MNS/GOST/IEC Screening for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC和功率质量——光伏逆变器MNS/GOST/IEC筛查
requirement_topic.zht: EMC和電能品質——光伏逆變器MNS/GOST/IEC篩查

summary.en: Mongolia PV inverter EMC evidence should be screened through the applicable MNS standards route, project technical specification, and grid-connection reviewer. Where international standards are requested, IEC 62920 is the dedicated EMC standard for PV power conversion equipment, and IEC 61000-series harmonic, flicker, immunity, and emission tests may be requested by the owner, lender, EPC, NDC, or distribution company. The exact mandatory status depends on whether MASM, a Mongolian technical regulation, the tender, or the grid-connection approval incorporates the standard.
summary.zh: 蒙古光伏逆变器EMC证据应通过适用MNS标准路径、项目技术规格和并网审查方进行筛查。如要求国际标准，IEC 62920是光伏功率变换设备的专用EMC标准，业主、融资方、EPC、NDC或配电公司可能要求IEC 61000系列谐波、闪变、抗扰度和发射测试。准确强制状态取决于MASM、蒙古技术法规、招标文件或并网批准是否纳入该标准。
summary.zht: 蒙古光伏逆變器EMC證據應通過適用MNS標準路徑、項目技術規格和併網審查方進行篩查。如要求國際標準，IEC 62920是光伏功率轉換設備的專用EMC標準，業主、融資方、EPC、NDC或配電公司可能要求IEC 61000系列諧波、閃變、抗擾度和發射測試。準確強制狀態取決於MASM、蒙古技術法規、招標文件或併網批准是否納入該標準。

standards_or_laws: MNS standards and MASM conformity route for the exact product scope
IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000-series EMC, harmonic, flicker, immunity, and emission standards where referenced by project or grid reviewer

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence commonly comes from GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, and CNAS-accredited domestic test reports. These may use IEC 61000-family methods but are China-scope documents. They should be translated, mapped clause-by-clause, and checked against the exact MNS/GOST/IEC or tender requirement before being used in Mongolia.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常来自GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004及CNAS认可国内测试报告。这些文件可能使用IEC 61000系列方法，但属于中国范围文件。在蒙古使用前，应翻译、逐条映射，并按准确MNS/GOST/IEC或招标要求核查。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常來自GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004及CNAS認可國內測試報告。這些文件可能使用IEC 61000系列方法，但屬於中國範圍文件。在蒙古使用前，應翻譯、逐條映射，並按準確MNS/GOST/IEC或招標要求核查。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
IEC 61000-series methods where referenced in Chinese test reports

gap.en: Gap: a China GB/T EMC report is not by itself proof of Mongolian acceptance. Exporters should prepare IEC 62920 and relevant IEC 61000 reports where requested, a clause crosswalk to MNS/GOST/IEC or tender requirements, model and firmware coverage, test-lab accreditation evidence, and a note explaining whether tests were performed at 220/380 V 50 Hz conditions applicable to the Mongolian project.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T EMC报告本身并不证明蒙古接受。出口商应按要求准备IEC 62920及相关IEC 61000报告、与MNS/GOST/IEC或招标要求的条款对照、型号和固件覆盖范围、实验室认可证据，以及说明测试是否在适用于蒙古项目的220/380 V 50 Hz条件下完成的说明。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T EMC報告本身並不證明蒙古接受。出口商應按要求準備IEC 62920及相關IEC 61000報告、與MNS/GOST/IEC或招標要求的條款對照、型號和韌體覆蓋範圍、實驗室認可證據，以及說明測試是否在適用於蒙古項目的220/380 V 50 Hz條件下完成的說明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where MASM conformity, MNS adoption, Mongolian technical regulation, tender, lender, owner, NDC, or distribution-company connection approval requires EMC or power-quality evidence; otherwise a due-diligence and procurement requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese EMC reports support China domestic or voluntary certification routes and are not automatically accepted as Mongolian MNS/GOST/IEC evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not treat China GB/T EMC files as standalone Mongolia acceptance evidence. Map the exact inverter model to MNS/GOST/IEC or tender EMC requirements, and obtain IEC 62920 or IEC 61000 reports where the Mongolian project, MASM route, NDC, distribution company, lender, or owner requires them.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将中国GB/T EMC文件视为蒙古独立接受证据。应将准确逆变器型号映射至MNS/GOST/IEC或招标EMC要求，并在蒙古项目、MASM路径、NDC、配电公司、融资方或业主要求时取得IEC 62920或IEC 61000报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將中國GB/T EMC文件視為蒙古獨立接受證據。應將準確逆變器型號映射至MNS/GOST/IEC或招標EMC要求，並在蒙古項目、MASM路徑、NDC、配電公司、融資方或業主要求時取得IEC 62920或IEC 61000報告。
